rulings.Case Title: BETTY PETERSON VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Plaintiffs' Motion To Compel Defendant Monterey Mechanical Company To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person Most Knowledgeable For Deposition, To Produce Documents, And To Extend The Close Of Discovery With Respect To Monterey Mechanical
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, January 12, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel defendant Monterey Mechanical Company to produce its custodian of records and person most knowledgeable for deposition, to produce documents and to extend the close of discovery with respect to Monterey Mechanical and for sanctions is continued to January 24, 2012 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 503 per the January 10 order. = (503/TLJ)
